description_long: This rifle object is composed of a series of rectangular, grid-like segments that form a fragmented, blocky silhouette. The structure appears to be made up of dark, metallic-looking cuboids, arranged in a way that suggests the general outline of a modern rifle, with a prominent barrel, receiver, and stock area. The surface texture is uniform, with a visible grid pattern that gives the object a modular, almost industrial appearance. There are no visible moving parts or detailed firearm mechanisms, and the overall form is abstracted, lacking fine details such as a trigger, safety, or magazine release. The coloration is a consistent dark gray or black, with no additional markings or color accents. The object appears solid, with some open spaces between the blocky segments, suggesting a partially hollow interior.
description: A blocky, grid-patterned rifle form made of dark, metallic cuboids, with an abstract, fragmented silhouette and consistent dark coloration.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow, elongated barrel and the fragmented, vertical arrangement of the cuboid segments.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the rifle, highlighting the layered, blocky construction and the overall silhouette of the stock, receiver, and barrel.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back end of the rifle, with the stock area and the segmented, grid-like structure most prominent.
description_view_3: Another side view, opposite to view 1, again showing the blocky, modular construction and the overall rifle profile.
